questions.question: Who preserved the Gita lineage?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:PRESERVED]->(:Entity {name:'GitaLineage'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who taught Manu?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:TAUGHT]->(:Entity {name:'Manu'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who received the ancient Gita?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:RECEIVED]->(:Entity {name:'AncientGita'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who determines rebirth?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:DETERMINES]->(:Entity {name:'Rebirth'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who recorded the Kurukshetra dialogue?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:RECORDED]->(:Entity {name:'KurukshetraDialogue'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who compiled the Mahabharata?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:COMPILED]->(:Entity {name:'Mahabharata'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who preserved the Gita tradition?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:PRESERVED]->(:Entity {name:'GitaTradition'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who stabilizes the mind?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:STABILIZES]->(:Entity {name:'Mind'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who governs existence?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:GOVERNS]->(:Entity {name:'Existence'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who sustains life?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:SUSTAINS]->(:Entity {name:'Life'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who purifies action?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:PURIFIES]->(:Entity {name:'Action'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who elevates towards liberation?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:ELEVATES]->(:Entity {name:'Liberation'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who creates imbalance?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:CREATES]->(:Entity {name:'Imbalance'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who leads to discipline?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:LEADS]->(:Entity {name:'Discipline'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who drives action?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:DRIVES]->(:Entity {name:'Action'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;
